description: This webinar hosted by Ben features Benson, a community volunteer from Binance Uganda, discussing how to use mobile money for cryptocurrency transactions. The session covers depositing money, conducting trades, and cashing out on the Binance platform.
topic_summary: A practical guide to using mobile money for cryptocurrency transactions in Uganda, including depositing, trading, and cashing out on Binance. [t=48:34] [t=97:03]
